title: Bucket Mobs Resources
description: Resource pack to accompany the plugin Simple Bucket Mobs
body:
# Bucket Mobs Resource Pack

This resource pack is to accompany the plugin [SimpleBucketMobs](https://github.com/ADHDMC/SimpleBucketMobs) 

There are textures for every mob currently in the game and as many variants and decorations as I could fit in a 16x16 texture
